subject: Unable to Login After Password Reset
message: I'm unable to access my account after resetting my password earlier today. Every time I try to sign in, I receive an 'Invalid Credentials' error even though I'm using the new password. Could you please help me restore access to my account as soon as possible?
summary: Customer cannot log in after resetting their password and receives an 'Invalid Credentials' error.
customer_intent: Restore access to their account as quickly as possible.
